recommendations.title: American Mary
recommendations.overview: A young medical student struggling to pay tuition is drawn into the shady world of underground body-modification.

recommendations.title: Vendetta
recommendations.overview: A hard-nosed detective deliberately commits a crime to get thrown in prison, allowing him the chance to seek vengeance on a criminal serving a life sentence for brutally murdering his wife.

recommendations.title: See No Evil 2
recommendations.overview: A group of friends pays a late-night visit to the city morgue to surprise Amy on her birthday. But the surprise is on them when the one-eyed corpse of brutal psychopath Jacob Goodnight unexpectedly rises from a cold sub-basement slab, turning their w

recommendations.title: ABCs of Death 2
recommendations.overview: Taking all that was great from the first instalment, the movie aims to be a wilder, leaner, faster-paced and even more entertaining anthology this time around, with a new crop of award-winning, visionary filmmakers from around the globe.
recommendations.director: Jen Soska, Robert Morgan, Julian Barratt, Juan Martínez Moreno, Hajime Ohata, Bruno Samper, Jim Hosking, Rodney Ascher, Jerome Sable, Marvin Kren, Todd Rohal, Sôichi Umezawa, Chris Nash, Alexandre Bustillo, Alejandro Brugués, Dennison Ramalho, Wolfgang Matzl, Aharon Keshales, Julian Gilbey, Kristina Buožytė, Robert Boocheck, E.L. Katz, Julien Maury, Larry Fessenden, Bill Plympton, Lancelot Oduwa Imasuen, Sylvia Soska, Steven Kostanski, Erik Matti, Vincenzo Natali, Navot Papushado

recommendations.title: The Substance
recommendations.overview: A fading celebrity decides to use a black market drug, a cell-replicating substance that temporarily creates a younger, better version of herself.

recommendations.title: The Witch: Part 1. The Subversion
recommendations.overview: Ja-yoon is a high school student who struggles with memory loss after she endured some unknown trauma during her childhood. While trying to uncover the truth, she is unwittingly dragged into a world of crime and finds herself on a journey that will a

recommendations.title: #Alive
recommendations.overview: As a grisly virus rampages a city, a lone man stays locked inside his apartment, digitally cut off from seeking help and desperate to find a way out.

recommendations.title: Black Box
recommendations.overview: After losing his wife and his memory in a car accident, a single father undergoes an experimental treatment that causes him to question who he really is.

recommendations.title: Lucca's World
recommendations.overview: Determined to help her son, who has cerebral palsy, Bárbara takes her family to India for an experimental treatment.

recommendations.title: The Traffic Policeman
recommendations.overview: An unemployed man gets a job as traffic policeman but the traffic in the big city creates innumerous problems for the poor guy.
